[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101101100 5
1 1110011100 6
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 1011001100 5
6 0100100010 3
7 1000010100 3

01 10 0000000000 a match 2 3 4
12 21 0000000000 a match 2 3 4
23 32 0000010100 2
34 43 0001011010 4
45 54 0000010010 2
56 65 0100100000 2
67 76 0100001100 3
70 07 1010001100 4

02 20 1000000100 2
13 31 0100000010 2
24 42 0000010000 1
35 53 0110010010 4
46 64 0001001000 2
57 75 0110010000 3
60 06 0001001100 3
71 17 0100000000 1

03 30 0011001100 4
14 41 0000000010 1
25 52 0000010000 1
36 63 0101001100 4
47 74 0000011000 2
50 05 0010000000 1
61 16 0100100000 2
72 27 1000010100 3 match 7

04 40 0001001000 2
15 51 0100100010 3 match 6
26 62 0000000100 1
37 73 0110011100 5
